notes: Core mechanics present (cars, logs, turtles, homes, lives, timer, levels) but river detection is unreliable causing frequent unfair deaths, home detection is finicky, and the visual presentation is very minimal with no real sprites or road markings.
A solid, error-free implementation with all core mechanics including diving turtles, but lacks the middle safe median and uses very basic shape graphics instead of sprites.
Core Frogger mechanics are mostly present, but there are notable logic/layout inaccuracies and likely edge-case bugs that keep it from feeling polished or fully faithful.
